CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-09-2026 Continued To May-27-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-06-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT IDA SADLER AS ADMINISTRATOR OF THE ESTATE OF QUEENIE ANDERSON AKA QUEEN ANDERSON DEMURRER to COMPLAINT

is SUSTAINED with leave to amend. This action shall be abated and stayed pending the final resolution of the Probate matters. Within 30 days of the final resolution of the probate matters Plaintiff shall file an amended complaint, if necessary and proper in light of the decisions made in the Probate matters.

Prevailing Party to submit proposed order that is in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b).

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: K. Valdes; Not Reported. (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-09-2026 Continued To Mar-25-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-04-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT IDA SADLER AS ADMINISTRATOR OF THE ESTATE OF QUEENIE ANDERSON AKA QUEEN ANDERSON DEMURRER to COMPLAINT;

is OFF CALENDAR. No meet and confer declaration pursuant to CCP 430.41 on file. Parties are ordered to meet and confer in good faith no later than December 31, 2025 on a mutually agreeable date in person or over the phone. If parties cannot agree on a date and time, parties shall meet and confer over the phone on December 18, 2025 at 2:00 p.m. Defendant shall file a demurrer no later than January 5, 2026 if necessary after meeting and conferring.

Judge: Anthony A. Trendacosta; Clerk: K. Valdes; Not Reported. (D501)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-17-2025 Continued To Nov-07-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT IDA SADLER AS ADMINISTRATOR OF THE ESTATE OF QUEENIE ANDERSON AKA QUEEN ANDERSON's DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Transferred to be heard in department 501 on November 7, 2025. That department handles all law and motion matters that arise from the sale/acquisition of real property per SF Local Rule 8.10A1.
